---
title: "Downscaling"
toc: true
---

```{=html}

<!-- ── CONTADORES (ancho completo, fuera del max-width) ── -->
<div class="counters-section">
  <div class="counter-item">
    <span class="counter-value" data-target="20945" data-suffix="">0</span>
    <span class="counter-label">celdas de la malla</span>
    <span class="counter-sub">5×5 km · Península + Baleares</span>
  </div>
  <div class="counter-divider"></div>
  <div class="counter-item">
    <span class="counter-value" data-target="6" data-suffix="">0</span>
    <span class="counter-label">modelos globales</span>
    <span class="counter-sub">ECMWF-SEAS5.1 · DWD · CMCC</span>
  </div>
  <div class="counter-divider"></div>
  <div class="counter-item">
    <span class="counter-value" data-target="5" data-suffix=" km">0</span>
    <span class="counter-label">resolución espacial</span>
    <span class="counter-sub">20× más fina que los modelos globales</span>
  </div>
  <div class="counter-divider"></div>
  <div class="counter-item">
    <span class="counter-value" data-target="6" data-suffix=" meses">0</span>
    <span class="counter-label">horizonte de predicción</span>
    <span class="counter-sub">Actualización periódica C3S</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ── CONTENIDO PRINCIPAL ───────────────────────────── -->
<div style="max-width:960px;margin:2rem auto;padding:0 1.5rem;">

  <span class="section-label">Metodología y resultados</span>
  <h2 style="color:#003087;font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Downscaling estadístico</h2>
  <p style="color:#4a5568;margin-bottom:1.5rem;">
    El algoritmo de análogos sinópticos proporciona precipitación diaria en una malla de 5×5 km (20.945 celdas) sobre la Península Ibérica e Islas Baleares, a partir de datos de baja resolución de los modelos de predicción estacional.
  </p>

  <div class="grid-2" style="margin-bottom:2rem;">
    <div class="info-card">
      <h3>Fase 1 · Calibración</h3>
      <p>Clasificación de tipos de tiempo mediante <em>K-means clustering</em> para identificar la base de datos sinóptica de referencia (1981–1996). La similitud se calcula a partir de distancias euclídeas ponderadas de las componentes del viento geostrófico en superficie y a 500 hPa (ERA5).</p>
    </div>
    <div class="info-card">
      <h3>Fase 2 · Estimación</h3>
      <p>La precipitación para cada celda se estima como la media ponderada de la precipitación asociada a las situaciones más análogas de la base de referencia, usando la similitud de los campos de viento geostrófico en superficie y a 500 hPa de los modelos C3S.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ============================================================ -->
  <!-- DESPLEGABLES POR MODELO                                       -->
  <!-- ============================================================ -->
  <h3 style="color:#003087;margin-top:2.5rem;margin-bottom:1rem;">Resultados por modelo</h3>
  <p style="font-size:0.85rem;color:#4a5568;margin-bottom:1rem;">Período de validez: <strong>AMJ 2026</strong> · Lead: marzo 2026</p>

  <div class="accordion" id="accordion-modelos">

    <!-- ECMWF -->
    <div class="accordion-item">
      <h2 class="accordion-header">
        <button class="accordion-button" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#mod-ecmwf">
          ECMWF-SEAS5.1
        </button>
      </h2>
      <div id="mod-ecmwf" class="accordion-collapse collapse show" data-bs-parent="#accordion-modelos">
        <div class="accordion-body">
          <div class="grid-2">
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/3_terciles_ecmwf_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="Terciles ECMWF"/><p class="img-caption">Probabilidad por terciles · Precipitación · AMJ 2026</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/4_corr-spearman_ecmwf_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="Correlación ECMWF"/><p class="img-caption">Correlación de Spearman · AMJ 2026</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/5_roc_3_pr_ecmwf_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="ROC ECMWF"/><p class="img-caption">Curvas ROC · Precipitación · AMJ 2026</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/6_rps_pr_ecmwf_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="RPS ECMWF"/><p class="img-caption">Ranked Probability Score (RPS) · AMJ 2026</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/7_bs_3_pr_ecmwf_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="BS ECMWF"/><p class="img-caption">Brier Score · AMJ 2026</p></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- DWD -->
    <div class="accordion-item">
      <h2 class="accordion-header">
        <button class="accordion-button collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#mod-dwd">DWD</button>
      </h2>
      <div id="mod-dwd" class="accordion-collapse collapse" data-bs-parent="#accordion-modelos">
        <div class="accordion-body">
          <div class="grid-2">
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/3_terciles_dwd_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="Terciles DWD"/><p class="img-caption">Probabilidad por terciles · AMJ 2026</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/4_corr-spearman_dwd_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="Correlación DWD"/><p class="img-caption">Correlación de Spearman · AMJ 2026</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/5_roc_3_pr_dwd_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="ROC DWD"/><p class="img-caption">Curvas ROC · AMJ 2026</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/6_rps_pr_dwd_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="RPS DWD"/><p class="img-caption">RPS · AMJ 2026</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/7_bs_3_pr_dwd_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="BS DWD"/><p class="img-caption">Brier Score · AMJ 2026</p></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- CMCC -->
    <div class="accordion-item">
      <h2 class="accordion-header">
        <button class="accordion-button collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#mod-cmcc">CMCC</button>
      </h2>
      <div id="mod-cmcc" class="accordion-collapse collapse" data-bs-parent="#accordion-modelos">
        <div class="accordion-body">
          <div class="grid-2">
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/3_terciles_cmcc_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="Terciles CMCC"/><p class="img-caption">Probabilidad por terciles · AMJ 2026</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/4_corr-spearman_cmcc_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="Correlación CMCC"/><p class="img-caption">Correlación de Spearman · AMJ 2026</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/5_roc_3_pr_cmcc_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="ROC CMCC"/><p class="img-caption">Curvas ROC · AMJ 2026</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/6_rps_pr_cmcc_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="RPS CMCC"/><p class="img-caption">RPS · AMJ 2026</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/7_bs_3_pr_cmcc_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="BS CMCC"/><p class="img-caption">Brier Score · AMJ 2026</p></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Météo-France -->
    <div class="accordion-item">
      <h2 class="accordion-header">
        <button class="accordion-button collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#mod-mf">Météo-France</button>
      </h2>
      <div id="mod-mf" class="accordion-collapse collapse" data-bs-parent="#accordion-modelos">
        <div class="accordion-body">
          <div class="grid-2">
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/3_terciles_meteo_france_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="Terciles MF"/><p class="img-caption">Probabilidad por terciles · AMJ 2026</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/4_corr-spearman_meteo_france_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="Correlación MF"/><p class="img-caption">Correlación de Spearman · AMJ 2026</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/5_roc_3_pr_meteo_france_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="ROC MF"/><p class="img-caption">Curvas ROC · AMJ 2026</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/6_rps_pr_meteo_france_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="RPS MF"/><p class="img-caption">RPS · AMJ 2026</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/7_bs_3_pr_meteo_france_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="BS MF"/><p class="img-caption">Brier Score · AMJ 2026</p></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div><!-- fin accordion-modelos -->

  <!-- ============================================================ -->
  <!-- DESPLEGABLES POR TIPO DE GRÁFICO                              -->
  <!-- ============================================================ -->
  <h3 style="color:#003087;margin-top:3rem;margin-bottom:1rem;">Resultados por tipo de gráfico</h3>

  <div class="accordion" id="accordion-graficos">

    <div class="accordion-item">
      <h2 class="accordion-header">
        <button class="accordion-button" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#graf-terciles">Probabilidad por terciles</button>
      </h2>
      <div id="graf-terciles" class="accordion-collapse collapse show" data-bs-parent="#accordion-graficos">
        <div class="accordion-body">
          <div class="grid-2">
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/3_terciles_ecmwf_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img"/><p class="img-caption">ECMWF-SEAS5.1</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/3_terciles_dwd_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img"/><p class="img-caption">DWD</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/3_terciles_cmcc_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img"/><p class="img-caption">CMCC</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/3_terciles_meteo_france_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img"/><p class="img-caption">Météo-France</p></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion-item">
      <h2 class="accordion-header">
        <button class="accordion-button collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#graf-corr">Correlación de Spearman</button>
      </h2>
      <div id="graf-corr" class="accordion-collapse collapse" data-bs-parent="#accordion-graficos">
        <div class="accordion-body">
          <div class="grid-2">
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/4_corr-spearman_ecmwf_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img"/><p class="img-caption">ECMWF-SEAS5.1</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/4_corr-spearman_dwd_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img"/><p class="img-caption">DWD</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/4_corr-spearman_cmcc_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img"/><p class="img-caption">CMCC</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/4_corr-spearman_meteo_france_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img"/><p class="img-caption">Météo-France</p></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion-item">
      <h2 class="accordion-header">
        <button class="accordion-button collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#graf-roc">Curvas ROC</button>
      </h2>
      <div id="graf-roc" class="accordion-collapse collapse" data-bs-parent="#accordion-graficos">
        <div class="accordion-body">
          <div class="grid-2">
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/5_roc_3_pr_ecmwf_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img"/><p class="img-caption">ECMWF-SEAS5.1</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/5_roc_3_pr_dwd_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img"/><p class="img-caption">DWD</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/5_roc_3_pr_cmcc_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img"/><p class="img-caption">CMCC</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/5_roc_3_pr_meteo_france_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img"/><p class="img-caption">Météo-France</p></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion-item">
      <h2 class="accordion-header">
        <button class="accordion-button collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#graf-rps">Ranked Probability Score (RPS)</button>
      </h2>
      <div id="graf-rps" class="accordion-collapse collapse" data-bs-parent="#accordion-graficos">
        <div class="accordion-body">
          <div class="grid-2">
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/6_rps_pr_ecmwf_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img"/><p class="img-caption">ECMWF-SEAS5.1</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/6_rps_pr_dwd_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img"/><p class="img-caption">DWD</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/6_rps_pr_cmcc_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img"/><p class="img-caption">CMCC</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/6_rps_pr_meteo_france_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img"/><p class="img-caption">Météo-France</p></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="accordion-item">
      <h2 class="accordion-header">
        <button class="accordion-button collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#graf-bs">Brier Score</button>
      </h2>
      <div id="graf-bs" class="accordion-collapse collapse" data-bs-parent="#accordion-graficos">
        <div class="accordion-body">
          <div class="grid-2">
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/7_bs_3_pr_ecmwf_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img"/><p class="img-caption">ECMWF-SEAS5.1</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/7_bs_3_pr_dwd_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img"/><p class="img-caption">DWD</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/7_bs_3_pr_cmcc_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img"/><p class="img-caption">CMCC</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/7_bs_3_pr_meteo_france_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img"/><p class="img-caption">Météo-France</p></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div><!-- fin accordion-graficos -->

  <!-- ============================================================ -->
  <!-- INFORME PDF                                                    -->
  <!-- ============================================================ -->
  <h3 style="color:#003087;margin-top:3rem;margin-bottom:0.8rem;">Informe de verificación</h3>
  <p style="font-size:0.85rem;color:#4a5568;margin-bottom:1rem;">
    Informe completo de verificación estacional · AMJ 2026 ·
    <a href="images/downscaling/verificacion_estacional_AMJ_2026.pdf" download style="color:#0072bc;font-weight:600;">
      ↓ Descargar PDF
    </a>
  </p>
  <div class="pdf-container">
    <iframe src="images/downscaling/verificacion_estacional_AMJ_2026.pdf"
            width="100%" height="100%" style="border:none;">
      Tu navegador no soporta la visualización de PDF.
      <a href="images/downscaling/verificacion_estacional_AMJ_2026.pdf">Descargar aquí</a>
    </iframe>
  </div>

</div>

<style>
.counters-section {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1px 1fr 1px 1fr 1px 1fr;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 2.5rem 4rem;
  background: #003087;
}
.counter-item { text-align: center; padding: 0 1rem; }
.counter-value {
  display: block; font-size: 2.8rem; font-weight: 800;
  color: white; line-height: 1; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
}
.counter-label {
  display: block; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); margin-top: 0.4rem;
  text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em;
}
.counter-sub {
  display: block; font-size: 0.68rem;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); margin-top: 0.3rem;
}
.counter-divider {
  width: 1px; height: 60px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); justify-self: center;
}
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .counters-section { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; padding: 2rem; }
  .counter-divider { display: none; }
}
</style>

<script>
(function() {
  const obs = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(entry => {
      if (!entry.isIntersecting) return;
      entry.target.querySelectorAll('.counter-value').forEach(el => {
        if (el.dataset.animated) return;
        el.dataset.animated = 'true';
        const target = parseInt(el.dataset.target);
        const suffix = el.dataset.suffix || '';
        const duration = target > 1000 ? 2000 : 1000;
        const start = performance.now();
        function step(now) {
          const p = Math.min((now - start) / duration, 1);
          const eased = 1 - Math.pow(1 - p, 3);
          el.textContent = Math.round(target * eased).toLocaleString('es-ES') + suffix;
          if (p < 1) requestAnimationFrame(step);
        }
        requestAnimationFrame(step);
      });
      obs.unobserve(entry.target);
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.3 });
  document.querySelectorAll('.counters-section').forEach(el => obs.observe(el));
})();
</script>
```
